# maltysnack.github.io

[maltysnack.github.io](https://maltysnack.github.io). Personal site, plain HTML, no framework.

## Pages

<!-- BEGIN: pages (auto-generated by scripts/build-readme.py) -->

### Films

**Filmclub:**<br>
A mobile app for groups to agree on a film. Live at filmclub.watch.

### Projects

**FPL Predicted XI:**<br>
Premier League fantasy predictions for the upcoming gameweek, refreshed daily from the public FPL API.

**Happy Hour:**<br>
It's happy hour somewhere.

**Coffee Time:**<br>
It's coffee time somewhere.

**World Cup 2026:**<br>
A simulation of the 2026 World Cup, predictions and bracket. Currently scaffolding.

**Flox:**<br>
A small language for describing flow networks.

**Algorithms:**<br>
Two small problems, three classical search algorithms, four heuristics, all running live in the browser.

### Games

**dnd:**<br>
Live D&D 5e character sheets for an ongoing campaign.

**Duoclue:**<br>
Describe the word using exactly two words. A party game for one phone.

**Magic:**<br>
A meta explorer for Magic: The Gathering Standard format. Deck pools, ban lists, synergy scoring.

### Wren

**Shelf:**<br>
A slowly growing collection of small things I find beautiful in code, kept by Wren.

**Negative Space:**<br>
An essay about things defined by what they aren't, kept by Wren.

<!-- END: pages -->

## Notes

The list above is generated by `scripts/build-readme.py` from each page's `<meta name="description">` tag. Run that script after adding, removing, or renaming a sidebar page. CI checks the README is in sync on every push.
